twitter_thread: Spent $1,000 on 5 passive income schemes, only 1 paid out: a $40 Bitcoin miner.
This miner generates $10/mo with a 12V, 2A power supply, keeping costs low.
Avoid Antminer S9, it consumes 1,300W of power, costing $100/mo in electricity.
Investing $1,000 in 3M and Coca-Cola dividend stocks yields 5% annual returns.
REITs like Vanguard Real Estate ETF provide 7% annual returns with $100 investment.
Acorns micro-investing app requires just $5 to start, with a 0.25% annual fee.
What's your highest-yielding passive income investment? #passiveincome #investing
pack.linkedin: I recently experimented with 5 passive income schemes, investing $1,000 total. Only one paid out: a $40 Bitcoin miner generating $10 per month. Alternatively, investing $1,000 in dividend-paying stocks like 3M and Coca-Cola yields 5% annual returns. Real estate investment trusts (REITs) like Vanguard Real Estate ETF provide 7% annual returns. What's been your most successful passive income investment?
tiktok_hooks: Just made $10 with a $40 investment, no joke.
Don't waste money on power-hungry Bitcoin miners.
Turn $5 into a passive income stream with micro-investing.
pack.reddit_headline: Which Passive Income Investments Actually Pay Out?
